REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF GREGORY JAYSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AN AMENDMENT COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN APRIL 30, 2018. AMENDED COMPLAINT SHALL INCLUDE FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS GIVING RISE TO REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT AGAINST WHOM PLAINTIFF IS ASSERTING PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ALL AMENDMENTS SHALL BE IN BOLD FONT. THE COURT FURTHER GRANTS 2 HOURS OF FURTHER DEPSITION OF THE PLAINTIFF RE: PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Continued To Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael L. Justice (818-991-4100) for Plaintiff/Moving party GREGORY JAYSON via CourtCall.
Robert J. Sheppard (415-296-0900 x 23) for Defendant/opposing party Wah Chack Lau Bypass Trust.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: negligence, no evidence re: intentional, deliberate, or nefarious concealment, fraud claims, punitive damages, no warning of serious damage, and further deposition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREGORY JAYSON's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file an amendment complaint no later than April 30, 2018. Amended complaint shall include factual allegations giving rise to request for punitive damages as to each defendant against whom Plaintiff is asserting punitive damages. All amendments shall be in bold font. The Court further grants 2 hours of further depsition of the plaintiff re: punitive damages claim. Plaintiff to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Continued To Apr-23-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GREGORY JAYSON'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint will be heard in Department 501 on April 24, 2018. Department 501 hears all cases involving disputes between landlords and tenants. All further law and motion matters in this case should be noticed to be heard in Department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
